default_flow.step_1: Super Admin OR Payroll table admin
Payroll table admin OR Super Admin OR Transaction processing admin
Payroll table admin OR Transaction processing admin OR Super Admin
AP Invoice Approver OR AP Invoice Payment Initiator OR AP Invoice Payment Pre-Authorizer OR AP Invoice Payment Authorizer

advanced_flow.label: Advanced approval flow
advanced_flow.description: Route approvals based on defined criteria. Multiple flows per type, evaluated in priority order.
operations: is less than or equals to

default_flow.label: Default approval flow
default_flow.description: Used if no matching advanced flow found. Fallback/catch-all flow.

ui_components: Left sidebar with scrollable flow type tabs (48 tabs)
Advanced approval flow section with Add advance flow button
Default approval flow section with inline configuration
Add step button for sequential approval levels
Add approver button for OR parallel approvers
Add block button for approval blocks
Approver role dropdown with system and custom roles
Line Manager level selector dropdown (1, 2, ...n levels)
Update approval flows button to save changes
Priority ordering for multiple advanced flows (ellipsis menu with Move up/Move down)
Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) icons per advanced flow

create.evidence: Clicked '+ Add advance flow' on Leave tab. Dialog opens with: Flow name field, Description field, 'Add criteria' button to define conditions, and 'Add approval step' section. Criteria dialog shows Data Point dropdown (60+ options), Operations dropdown (8 options: is between, is not between, is equal to, etc.), and Value field. Approval step has role dropdown with system + custom roles.

read.evidence: Viewed existing advanced flows on Air Ticket tab. Two flows visible: 'Adv AF - Amount exceeding 3000' (priority 1) and 'Adv AF - Amount more than 4000' (priority 2). Each shows flow name and description inline. Clicking edit icon shows full criteria and approval step configuration.

update.evidence: Clicked edit (pencil) icon on first Air Ticket advanced flow. Edit dialog opened showing: Flow name 'Adv AF - Amount exceeding 3000', 2 criteria (Policy Allowance Amount -> Amount is greater than 3000, Policy Allowance Amount -> Currency is equal to AED), Logic: 'Execute when ALL criteria(s) match', Approval: Step 1 - Line Manager (1 level). All fields editable. Cancelled without saving.

delete.evidence: Clicked delete (trash) icon on an advanced flow. Confirmation dialog appeared: 'Delete approval flow? This action is permanent and cannot be undone.' with Cancel and Delete buttons. Cancelled without deleting.

priority_reorder.evidence: Clicked ellipsis (three-dot) menu on first advanced flow. Context menu showed 'Move down in priority' option. For flows not at position 1, 'Move up in priority' is also available.

findings: Advanced approval flow section present with 'If conditions' label
Add advance flow button opens dialog with Flow name, Description, Criteria, and Approval steps
Criteria configuration supports 60+ data points including Department, Office, Leave Type, Employee attributes
8 comparison operations available: is between, is not between, is equal to, is not equal to, is greater than, is greater than or equals, is less than, is less than or equals to
Criteria logic: 'Execute when ALL criteria(s) match'
Default flow configured with Super Admin OR Line Manager - 1
Custom roles available in approver dropdown (Line Manager - 1, Tickets Custom Role, AKQA, etc.)
Sequential steps supported with numbered ordering (1, 2, 3...)
OR logic between approvers within same step for redundancy
Payroll Transaction tab present at /enterprise/dashboard/approval-flow/payroll-transaction-request-flow
Advanced + Default sections both available
Default flow: Step 1 - Super Admin OR Payroll table admin (OR condition confirmed)
Add step and Add approver buttons available for multi-level hierarchy
Add block button present for additional approval blocks
Maker-checker controls enforceable through multi-step configuration
Expense tab present at /enterprise/dashboard/approval-flow/expense-flow
1 existing advanced flow ('test') configured with edit/delete icons
Default flow: Step 1 - Super Admin as approver
Independent from Payroll Transaction - separate tab with separate configuration
Full approval configuration capabilities available (add step, add approver, add block)
Role Management at /enterprise/dashboard/roles under Settings > Organization
Two tabs: Role assignment and Custom roles
Role assignment tab: Table of 45+ employees with their assigned roles and Edit button per employee
Assign roles button (purple) at top of Role assignment tab
Multiple roles per employee confirmed (e.g., Anne Macalintal has 25+ roles)
Custom roles tab: 15 custom roles with Add new, view (eye icon), edit (pencil icon), delete (trash icon) actions
Custom role view dialog shows: Role Name (EN/AR), Role Description (EN/AR), Policy assignment with Unassigned Policies (63) and Assigned Policies sections

Custom roles listed: Line Manager - 1, Workflow Manager, Line Manager - 2 (Not for use), General Manager, attendance custom, Line Manager - All, Work Expense Manager, People Manager 2, Payroll Testing (SAF), Tickets Custom Role, Emp Tickets - Custom, AKQA, Business Travel Approver, Test Custom Role, CET Custom Role
OR logic is fully supported between approvers within same step (verified on Leave, Payroll Transaction, Leave Salary Request, Accounts Payable, Leave Encashment tabs)
Advanced flows support 60+ criteria data points for conditional routing
8 comparison operations available for each criteria condition
Multiple advanced flows can coexist with priority ordering (verified on Air Ticket tab with 2 flows)
The original limitation is largely resolved - OR logic and criteria-based routing are both available
WOF-001.evidence: Validated on multiple tabs. Leave tab shows Super Admin OR Line Manager - 1. Accounts Payable shows 4 approvers with OR logic. Air Ticket has 2 advanced flows with criteria including Amount > 3000 and Currency = AED.

WOF-002.theme: Missing Approval Workflows in Key Modules
findings: Business Trip Request NOW HAS a dedicated approval flow tab (screenshot 13-business-trip-request-tab.png)
Business Travel Approver custom role exists in Role Management
Payroll Transaction has dedicated approval flow tab
48 total approval flow tabs exist, including many custom ticket types
Commission processing: no dedicated tab found, but could be added as a custom ticket type
WOF-002.evidence: Business Trip Request tab visible in sidebar and content area with full Advanced + Default flow configuration. Default flow: Super Admin.

findings: Custom roles ARE supported (15 custom roles found with full CRUD: Add new, view, edit, delete)
Custom role view dialog shows policy assignment (Unassigned Policies: 63, Assigned Policies shown)
Custom roles appear in approval flow approver dropdowns
Admin-only access to approval flow config is by design (security) - not a bug
Feature flag enforcement not testable from UI
WOF-003.evidence: Custom roles tab shows 15 roles. View dialog for 'Line Manager - 1' shows Role Name, Description (EN/AR), and policy assignment interface.

findings: Cannot verify notification routing from approval flow configuration UI alone
Requires end-to-end testing with actual approval submissions
No notification settings visible in the approval flow configuration interface
WOF-004.evidence: Approval flow UI only shows flow configuration (steps, approvers, criteria). No notification or status sync settings visible.

findings: Leave Salary Request tab exists with full approval flow configuration
Default flow: Payroll table admin OR Super Admin OR Transaction processing admin (3 approvers with OR logic)
The 'missing tab' mentioned in tickets has been addressed
